entry.value: An unexpected error occurred: Unable to determine work item owner due to errors in rule: WorkItemForward-Rule, BeanShell script error: bsh.EvalError: Sourced file: inline evaluation of: ``import sailpoint.api.ObjectUtil; import sailpoint.api.Workflower; import sai . . . '' : Class or variable not found: WorkItem.State.Rejected : at Line: 23 : in file: inline evaluation of: ``import sailpoint.api.ObjectUtil; import sailpoint.api.Workflower; import sai . . . '' : WorkItem .State .Rejected BSF info: WorkItemForward-Rule at line: 0 column: columnNo.
This request timed out waiting for verification of one or more items.
